Upcoming Events
Tentative Events in Spring 2024
T&L at Lunch Series
Best practices for teaching with Canvas
Student AI literacy survey results sharing
Learning space follow-up discussion
Teaching in a large class
Teaching in a 75-min class vs. 2.5-hr class
7-week teaching strategies
Inclusive teaching
Flipped classroom
Teaching grant mid-point sharing
Join us for a casual lunch talk on the last Thursday of every month.
Dates: January 25, February 29, March 28, and April 25
Location: West corner of the 2nd Floor Cafeteria, Community Center.
